answers: Dating tips: be yourself, ask questions, listen more than talk, plan thoughtful dates, and communicate openly.
Online dating: use good photos, write honest bio, meet in public first, tell a friend, and trust your gut.
Healthy dating: respect boundaries, communicate expectations, don't rush, and prioritize compatibility over attraction.
Dating advice: nijer moto thako, honest thako, aste aste jano, ar rush koro na. Communication is key.
